title: ACES Scenario Pack — Runtime Profile (v0)
description: Portable, ACES-native runtime expectations needed to understand a pack. It must not require private infrastructure or product-specific execution behavior.

packId.description: Pack this runtime profile applies to.

description.description: What the profile expects, in ACES-native terms.

portable.description: Must be true: the profile must be resolvable without private infrastructure. A non-portable runtime profile is not a valid scenario-pack runtime profile.

requires.description: Portable capability names the profile requires; no private hosts, endpoints, or product runtimes.
